meta.source: curated; verified vs Wikipedia List of UFC events

moments.clue: A slim gi-clad jiu-jitsu practitioner chokes out a savate stylist to win the very first eight-man tournament.
'The Iceman' avenges a loss with a first-round knockout to take the belt from his greatest rival.
A legendary wrestler retires (for now) after a third knockout loss closes out a defining trilogy.
A dominant welterweight champ manhandles the sport's original icon in a passing-of-the-torch beating.
A Hawaiian is dominating until his ribs give out, and the champ rallies for a comeback stoppage.
A rivalry that helped mainstream the sport ends with the champ stopping his former friend again.
One overhand right ends the reign of a beloved champion and avenges a past loss.
Before a roaring hometown crowd, a champion avenges the biggest upset of his career with brutal knees.
A title defense ends anticlimactically when the challenger's knee buckles on its own in the third.
A massive former pro-wrestler takes the heavyweight crown in only his fourth pro fight.
A superfight between two champions ends in a lopsided beating and a lingering 'greasing' controversy.
On a milestone card, a mountainous champion unifies the belt and taunts the booing crowd.
A karate champion keeps his belt on a hugely disputed decision that most fans thought he lost.
A challenger survives two fight-ending submission attempts but loses every round on the cards.
The champion weathers a brutal first-round beating, then submits a challenger who gasses out.
Losing four-plus rounds to a trash-talking wrestler, the champ pulls off a triangle-armbar with two minutes left.
A relentless wrestler-boxer batters the champ to become the first Mexican-American heavyweight king.
A jab shuts one eye of a coaching rival across a one-sided five-round title defense.
At 23, a phenom dismantles the champion to become the youngest titleholder in company history.
A record indoor crowd watches a champion grind out a decision while nursing a badly damaged eye.
A young champion submits a former titleholder late to keep rolling through the division.
After nearly being finished twice across their trilogy, the champion lands a fourth-round knockout to settle it.
A five-round slugfest widely hailed as one of the greatest fights ever ends on a razor-close decision.
Liver kicks end a former champion's run, and he retires in the cage afterward.
A hometown champion knees out a wrestler at the horn, then leaps into the crowd to celebrate.
A point-fighting game plan wins an interim belt over a pressure-fighting Stockton rival, sparking outrage.
A close decision on the promotion's return to Japan hands over the lightweight belt.
A grudge match between former training partners goes the champion's way over five rounds.
The most-hyped grudge rematch of its era ends with a knee to the chest in the second round.
Returning from a torn knee, a champion survives a near-finish head kick to reclaim his unified belt.
A challenger reclaims the heavyweight belt with a five-round mauling that reverses an earlier knockout loss.
The promotion's first women's bout ends the way almost all of hers did — a first-round armbar.
A champion out-wrestles a trash-talking Stockton rival across five rounds in a heated grudge match.
The longest-reigning champ ever clowns one time too many and gets flattened, ending a seven-year reign.
A dominant champion is pushed to the absolute limit for the first time, edging a five-round war.
The rubber match of a heavyweight trilogy ends in a decisive fifth-round stoppage for the champion.
A checked leg kick snaps the former champion's shin in a gruesome rematch finish.
Two heavy hitters slug out five rounds for a vacant welterweight belt after the long-time champ walked away.
A champion pops his challenger's shoulder with a defensive grip and cruises to a decision defense.
A massive underdog out-strikes and out-moves the pound-for-pound champ before a fifth-round finish.
A young champion out-points an elusive karateka to prove his title reign was no fluke.
Two rivals who brawled at a press conference finally meet; the champ wins a bad-blood decision.
A taunt-filled catchweight spectacle between two icons is later overturned to a no-contest over drug tests.
Dropped early, a wrestler recovers to submit a knockout artist for a vacant belt.
At high altitude, a gassed champion gets submitted, unifying the belt for a Brazilian grappler.
A brash Irishman survives takedowns and elbows to stop a late-notice wrestler for an interim belt.
A grinding five-round war sees the champion narrowly retain against the division's toughest out.
Before 56,000 fans, a former boxing world champion head-kicks the sport's biggest star into a stunning upset.
A single counter left hand ends a decade-long unbeaten reign in thirteen seconds.
A frantic, back-and-forth five-round title war ends on a split decision fans still argue about.
Stepping up on short notice two divisions north, a Stockton underdog submits a superstar and shocks the world.
The champion rushes in and gets countered cold, crowning a new heavyweight king before a huge Brazilian crowd.
On eleven days' notice, a long-time gatekeeper knocks out the champion to finally win a belt.
On a landmark card, a Brazilian powerhouse submits the champion in under four minutes to begin a historic reign.
A first-round knockout ends a beloved champion's reign and starts a long, divisive one.
A blood-soaked rematch of a stunning upset goes the distance and ends in a razor-thin majority decision.
Rocked early, a hometown Ohio champion recovers to knock out a former kickboxing star in the first.
On the promotion's Madison Square Garden debut, a challenger becomes the first to hold two belts at once.
A rising Hawaiian stops a former lightweight champ to grab an interim belt and start a long win streak.
A former superstar's comeback lasts 48 seconds against a devastating champion.
A champion submits a feared knockout artist again, prompting the challenger to retire in the cage.
A rising star stops the long-reigning champion in his own country to unify the featherweight belt.
A head-kick knockout in the rematch is later overturned to a no-contest after a failed drug test.
A returning welterweight legend jumps up a division and chokes out the champion to win a belt in a new weight class.
A wrestling champion neutralizes a terrifying puncher for five rounds to set a heavyweight defense record.
After a chaotic week of dropouts and a bus-window rampage, an undefeated grappler wins a vacant belt on points.
A two-division champion is crowned when he flattens the record-setting heavyweight king in the first round.
The biggest pay-per-view in company history ends in a fourth-round tap and a wild post-fight brawl over the cage.
Relocated on six days' notice over a drug-test flag, a returning great stops his toughest rival in the rematch.
A flashy young striker out-points his aging idol in a respectful, technical showcase.
A champion is docked a point for an illegal knee but cruises to a clear decision defense.
Two featherweight rivals move up a division for an interim belt in an instant-classic five-round decision.
A challenger blows out both knees mid-fight yet nearly pulls off the upset, losing a split decision.
The former champ reclaims his belt with a body-shot barrage that drops the man who KO'd him a year earlier.
An undefeated champion unifies the belt with a third-round rear-naked choke.
Before 57,000 fans, a challenger knocks out the champion in the second to unify the middleweight belt.
A one-off 'baddest' belt is decided by a doctor's stoppage for a nasty cut, to the crowd's dismay.
A brutal grudge match between former teammates ends with a broken jaw and a fifth-round stoppage.
A superstar's comeback lasts forty seconds thanks to shoulder strikes and a head kick.
A champion keeps his belt on a controversial decision many thought he lost, in his last fight at the weight.
On the sport's return during the shutdown, a five-round beating ends a long win streak and earns an interim belt.
On six days' notice at a remote island venue, a late replacement drops a decision to the dominant champ.
The rubber match of a heavyweight trilogy goes the champion's way on the cards, closing the rivalry.
An undefeated champion toys with an undefeated challenger before a second-round finish.
Chopping leg kicks set up the first knockout loss of a superstar's career in their rematch.
Before the first full-capacity crowd back from the pandemic, a champion ends the rivalry with a highlight knockout.
A trilogy fight ends in the cruelest way when a superstar snaps his ankle at the end of round one.
A champion survives two deep submission scares to win a featherweight classic on the cards.
A rematch of a brutal rivalry goes all five rounds this time, with the champ retaining a close decision.
A Brazilian submission wizard survives a rocky start to sink a third-round choke and defend his belt.
Fighting on a bad knee, a knockout artist surprises everyone by out-wrestling his former training partner.
A flashy champion coasts to a cautious decision that draws boos on a stacked holiday-weekend card.
A kickboxing rival who beat him twice before finishes the champ late in the fifth to take the belt.
Two pound-for-pound kings collide as a champion narrowly edges a smaller titleholder moving up a division.
Stepping in on short notice for a rematch, a smaller champ is starched by a head kick in round one.
A composed champion out-strikes a trash-talking challenger over five rounds to defend his belt.
On a milestone card, a former kickboxer defends his new belt with a first-round knockout.
On a chaotic week that lost its original headliner, a champion lands a highlight head kick to retain.
A relentless cardio machine out-works a flashy champion to take the bantamweight belt at a Sphere spectacle.
A returning great ends a heavyweight legend's career with a spinning-kick-to-the-body finish.
A knockout-artist champion stops a Brazilian challenger for the second time.
A former reality-show underdog leg-kicks his way to a razor-close decision and the belt.
On the promotion's return to England, a hometown star out-points a brawler.
Two former champions meet at a catchweight in a close decision.
A blood-soaked lightweight decision earns a title shot for the winner.
A former champ grinds out a decision over a quirky, unpredictable striker.
An elusive karate stylist knocks out an undefeated champion to take the belt.
Two aging legends trade a competitive decision in a heavyweight showcase.
A hard left hand ends the night early for a former middleweight champ.
A veteran legend out-works a once-hyped prospect over three rounds.
A returning former champion avenges a loss in a close, controversial rematch decision.
A dominant champion opens a huge cut and finishes his challenger in the fifth.
A former champion out-wrestles a dangerous Brazilian striker over three rounds.
A rising wrestler-boxer becomes the first to knock out a legendary Brazilian, earning a title shot.
After a disputed first meeting, the challenger removes all doubt with a first-round knockout.
A long-simmering coaching feud finally settles with a competitive decision.
A body shot sets up the knockout that pushes a beloved legend toward retirement.
A speedy champion removes all doubt from an upset by clearly out-pointing the former king in the rematch.
A knee ends the night for a legendary kickboxer in a heavyweight clash.
A hometown favorite edges a judo stylist in a close London decision.
A grinding decision earns a middleweight title shot in Germany.
A former champion edges an elusive karateka in a razor-thin, disputed decision.
A picture-perfect front kick to the face produces one of the greatest knockouts ever.
A former champion drops a wrestler early but has to settle for a draw.
A former champion out-points a deaf wrestler he once coached.
A slick boxer batters a heavy-handed wrestler for three rounds to earn a title shot.
A rangy, in-and-out champion out-points his longtime rival to defend the bantamweight belt.
A former champion stops an aging rival to punch his ticket to a title shot.
A dominant champion knocks out the last man to hold a win over him, at home in Brazil.
A high-volume Stockton boxer out-strikes a former champion, who retires in the cage afterward.
A wrestler's ground-and-pound forces a corner stoppage in England.
A champion chokes an elusive challenger unconscious with a standing guillotine, then lets him fall.
A knockout-artist champion drops a former titleholder to defend the heavyweight belt.
Two legends brawl at a catchweight in Brazil, with the American edging a decision.
A champion narrowly retains a lightweight belt in a hotly disputed rematch decision.
A champion survives a scary early armbar, then submits the challenger himself.
A middleweight great toys with a light heavyweight before a knee to the body ends it.
A dominant champion out-points a former lightweight king to defend the featherweight belt.
A champion finishes a trash-talking challenger in a round despite breaking his own toe grotesquely.
A relentless champion overwhelms a giant Brazilian for a second brutal first-round stoppage.
A former champion out-wrestles a legendary power-puncher in a split decision.
A challenger's shoulder pops out mid-fight, ending his title bid against the champion at home in Brazil.
A challenger sinks a first-round armbar to take the lightweight belt and complete a rivalry.
A battered champion wins a hugely controversial split decision, then walks away from the sport at his peak.
A dominant champion stops his rival early to retain the bantamweight belt.
A dominant champion ends an Olympic wrestler's night with a first-round knee to the body.
The pound-for-pound flyweight king cruises to another shutout title defense.
A new champion head-kicks a debuting late-replacement challenger in the fifth.
The pound-for-pound flyweight king racks up another dominant defense with a kimura.
A featherweight classic in Brazil sees the champion narrowly out-point a powerful wrestler in the rematch.
On the promotion's Mexico debut, a Brazilian grappler wins an interim belt with a knee finish.
A rematch of a five-round war goes the other way this time on a razor-thin decision.
A champion catches a rushing challenger in a 14-second armbar, her fastest finish.
A relentless Brazilian pressure-fighter out-works a flashy champion to take the lightweight belt.
A champion sinks the latest submission in UFC history — an armbar with one second left.
A champion silences a trash-talking challenger with a 34-second knockout in Brazil.
The flyweight king avenges a close fight by clearly out-pointing a fast-handed challenger in the rematch.
A returning great wins an interim belt on the cards after a long layoff and a late opponent switch.
A champion survives two knockdowns from a retiring legend to keep his belt at home.
The first women's featherweight champion is crowned amid controversy over late-hit strikes.
A champion retains his belt in a rematch after their first meeting ended in a draw.
A champion avenges an old loss with a first-round knockout to defend the heavyweight belt.
A durable challenger overcomes an explosive wrestler to win an interim middleweight belt.
A champion edges a technical striker in a razor-close rematch decision.
A third-round triangle choke wins an interim lightweight belt and extends a long win streak.
A rising champion stops the former long-reigning king again to cement his featherweight reign.
A feared knockout artist out-points a former boxing champion to defend the featherweight belt.
A missed-weight challenger knocks out a former champion late in a fight for a vacant interim belt.
A dominant featherweight champion stops a short-notice challenger in the first round.
A dominant champion stops a game challenger in the fifth to defend at home in Brazil.
A champion survives a five-round war with an explosive rival who missed weight, winning a decision.
A champion knocks out his former teammate again to close a bitter rivalry.
A champion submits an undefeated challenger with a second-round D'Arce choke.
A two-division champion submits a heavy-handed knockout artist late to defend the heavyweight belt.
A champion gives an undefeated challenger a five-round boxing lesson before a doctor's stoppage.
A champion is slammed unconscious in a stunning upset in Brazil.
An Olympic-gold champion rallies from a rough start to win a vacant second belt.
A champion out-points a former lightweight king to defend the featherweight belt.
A champion wins a cautious, low-output decision that draws loud boos.
A two-division champion cruises to a five-round shutout in a featherweight defense.
An undefeated champion wins with a triangle choke, then retires in the cage in tears.
A hard-hitting champion submits a challenger in the first round of a flyweight defense.
A wild, back-and-forth flyweight classic ends in a majority draw, with the belt retained.
A champion survives an early scare to knock out a former training partner in the third.
A middleweight champion moving up loses a decision, denied in his bid to hold two belts.
A terrifying puncher avenges a loss and takes the heavyweight belt with a second-round knockout.
A Brazilian survives a first-round scare to knock out a newcomer for a vacant lightweight belt.
A champion cruises to a shutout decision in a rematch of an old split decision.
A slick technician stops a knockout artist to win an interim heavyweight belt.
A 42-year-old submits the champion in the second round to finally win the belt.
A champion out-points the former titleholder again in a closer-than-expected rematch.
Two former friends turned bitter enemies settle it, with the wrestler winning a lopsided decision.
A dominant champion stops a beloved challenger in the fourth to defend the featherweight belt.
A Brazilian submits a rushing challenger in the first, though he'd already lost the belt on the scale.
A challenger sinks a rear-naked choke with less than 30 seconds left to steal the belt in a classic.
A dominant former champion reclaims her belt with a one-sided decision in the rematch.
Losing on the cards, a challenger lands a head kick with under a minute left for a stunning upset.
After a chaotic weigh-in reshuffle, a Stockton veteran submits a fan favorite in his contract's final fight.
A grappling ace submits a Brazilian in the second to win a vacant lightweight belt.
A fight for a vacant light-heavyweight belt ends in a controversial split draw, leaving it empty.
A younger challenger out-points a 43-year-old legend to win a vacant belt in his final fight.
Returning after years away and moving up a division, a great submits a striker in the first for a vacant belt.
A champion out-points his rival in their London trilogy bout to close the series.
A champion avenges a knockout loss with a knockout of his own to reclaim the belt.
A champion out-points a returning Olympic gold medalist to defend the bantamweight belt.
A two-division great cruises to a decision and then retires as champion in the cage.
A dominant champion stops a flashy challenger in the third to unify the featherweight belt.
A head kick avenges an old loss and wins a 'baddest' belt in a violent rematch.
A flashy challenger knocks out the champion in the second to take the bantamweight belt.
A brash pressure-fighter shocks the champion, dropping him early and cruising to a decision upset.
A former kickboxer stops a returning ex-champion late to win a vacant light-heavyweight belt.
A South African edges the champion in a razor-thin split decision to take the middleweight belt.
An undefeated challenger knocks out the long-reigning champion to take the featherweight belt.
A champion avenges the only loss on his record with a clear decision defense.
A champion out-points a late-notice underdog to defend the flyweight belt at home.
A champion escapes a late guillotine scare and submits the veteran in the fifth.
A relentless challenger out-grapples the champion at home to take the welterweight belt.
A champion submits a former titleholder in the fourth to defend the middleweight belt.
A champion weathers a game challenger before a fourth-round stoppage in his third defense of the year.
An undefeated champion knocks out a beloved veteran to defend the featherweight belt.
